location1.t3: Look around and see what you can find.

location2.name: You
location2.t1: There's something eerie about this place. There's buildings here but no one around.

location3.t5: I have something to tell you.

location3.name: You
location3.t3: I feel so small up here.

location1_afterTrigger.name: Item
location1_afterTrigger.t1: You found a mysterious glowing orb!
This orb will lead you to me.
location1_afterTrigger.t2: Come find me before it's too late.
location1_afterTrigger.t3: My life fire is fading, I need your help to find me before I disappear forever.

location2_afterTrigger.t1: This contains knowledge from the past.

location3_afterTrigger.name: Item
location3_afterTrigger.t2: I have something to tell you too.
